user.title: LiveKit Voice Assistant
user.description: Connect your LiveKit project so the dashboard card can talk to your voice agent worker.

data_description.agent_name: Must match AGENT_NAME in agent/agent.py (default: ha-agent)
data_description.scheduler_url: Base URL of the scheduler service, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8080. Enables the Schedules tab.
data_description.scheduler_token: Must match SCHEDULER_TOKEN in the scheduler's .env

abort.single_instance_allowed: LiveKit Voice Assistant is already configured.

init.title: LiveKit Voice settings
init.description: Edit the LiveKit connection and (optionally) the scheduler service.

data_description.agent_name: Must match AGENT_NAME in agent/agent.py (default: ha-agent)
data_description.scheduler_url: Base URL of the scheduler service, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8080. Enables the Schedules tab.
data_description.scheduler_token: Must match SCHEDULER_TOKEN in the scheduler's .env
